title: DataPackageKitObject - Metadata API
description: Represents the object in Data Kit Content Object. These objects are added inside the data kit.

masterLabel.description: Label that identifies the AI application throughout the Salesforce user interface.

parentDataPackageKitDefinitionName.description: Name of the data kit definition

referenceObjectName.description: The name of the data kit content.

referenceObjectType.description: The type of the content object in the data kit.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a DataPackageKitDefinition component.
